testSummary: Cold pnpm test 39/39 tasks, exit 0. local-api integration (real PG) 18 across 5 files (router-role-enforcement, workspace-scope, system-admin-audit, segment-size-preview, onboarding-domain). web unit 33 (nav 5, api-client 6, switch 3, segment-ast 6, campaign-builder 4 + Phase 11). No regression phases 2-11.
e2eSummary: Playwright REAL Chromium with BOTH servers (local-api :8787 + Vite :5173, apiClient via VITE_API_BASE, globalSetup seeds real PG): 9/9 specs passed — login-workspace-switch (re-scope no cross-bleed), role-visibility (nav hiding + server-side 403 for marketer on billing via in-browser fetch), build-segment (live size preview scoped), broadcast-and-campaign (compose+send, build+save workflow), + 2 reused editor specs. SES/SQS/DNS mocked; Postgres never mocked.
notes: services/local-api thin Hono server; per request: local authorizer (decode dev token, load memberships+platform_admins from REAL PG, run production authorize()) -> contextFromAuthorizer() -> enforceRoute(ctx,capability) via single ROUTE_TABLE -> handlers scope every DB op to ctx.workspaceId (workspace_id ALWAYS from token never body). Reused (not reimplemented): @cdp/tenancy, @cdp/service-api (contextFromAuthorizer/enforceRoute/handleAdminAccess/writeAuditEntry), @cdp/service-authorizer authorize, @cdp/db scopedQuery, @cdp/segments, services/broadcast runBroadcast, services/campaign-runner validate, services/onboarding cores. Invariants proven integration (real PG) AND e2e (real browser): server-side role+scope independent of UI; workspace_id never from body (apiClient assertNoWorkspaceIdInBody, allowWorkspaceId only for dev-login/switch); switch re-scopes no cross-bleed; system-admin cross-tenant reads -> admin_audit_log. Detail: scopedQuery can't wrap ORDER BY/LIMIT so list handlers use explicit WHERE workspace_id=$1 (still token-scoped). dev:api uses tsx; SES/DNS/SQS local fakes (LOCAL_SES_DKIM_STATUS gates onboarding). Mock/local auth spec-permitted for e2e.
